Message: Walao eh, Isnin pagi dah rasa nak mati. Packing dah start bertingkat-tingkat ni.
Morning geng! Sales hari ni on fire! Banyak order masuk semalam punya. Kongsi Raya punya pasal!
Aiyo Muthu, janganlah tambah pressure. Waybill nak start key-in ni, tangan dah lenguh dah.
Kak Yah, J&T punya pickup bila sampai ah? Barang dah ready, tapi takde waybill macam mana nak gerak?
Kejap Farhan, tengah printing batch pertama. Lepas tu baru key-in tracking number. Slow sikit la.
Kak Yah, cepat sikit lah. Customer tu dah bising-bising. They want their barang before Friday.
Muthu, lu ingat key-in tu pakai magic ke? Kak Yah sorang je tu, bukan robot.
Betul Farhan. Kepala dah pening ni. Banyak sangat order.
Team, morning. How are things looking for today's shipments? Any major issues?
Boss, sales cun. Order manyak. Cuma delivery kena push lagi. Warehouse tengah bottleneck sikit.
Boss, bukan bottleneck sikit. Ini bottleneck besar giler. Waybill tak keluar, barang tak gerak.
Boss, saya tengah buat sehabis baik ni. Waybill J&T memang kena manual enter satu-satu.
Okay, Kak Yah, just do your best. Farhan, help Kak Yah if you can, where possible.
Boss, gua takleh tolong key-in, gua kena packing. Kalau tak packing, lagi lambat.
Boss, customer Siow Lim dah call. Dia punya order 50 karton bila boleh hantar? Urgently needed, bro.
Aiyo, 50 karton? Yang tu kena ambil masa sikit. Tengah buat yang kecik-kecik dulu.
J&T Van dah sampai ke belum ni? Ada banyak barang dah ready pick up tapi takde tracking number.
Kejap Farhan, driver J&T cakap dia otw. Dia pun lambat sebab banyak pickup tempat lain.
Okay guys, serious question. How many orders can we ship out today max? Give me a number.
Muthu, entah la wei. Tengok Kak Yah punya jari laju mana. Gua packing sampai nak tercabut bahu ni.
Muthu, janganlah push macam tu. Nanti saya salah key-in, lagi teruk nanti.
Muthu, don't pressure Kak Yah. We need accuracy more than speed.
Boss, J&T van dah datang tapi dia nak 30 minit je. Barang kita banyak gila ni, takkan sempat.
Aduh, kenapa driver tu macam tu. Setengah jam mana cukup.
Farhan, Kak Yah, push lah! Cepat sikit. Rugi nanti kalau van tu pergi macam tu je.
Muthu, lu datang sini tengok la. Bukan senang la. Gua dah angkut barang sampai peluh jantan dah ni.
Okay, J&T dah ambil first batch. Tapi manyak lagi takde tracking number. Driver tu kena datang balik.
Aiyo, datang balik? Bila pulak? Customer Budi dah bising-bising. Dia order keropok lekor banyak.
Keropok lekor tu kena cepat la, nanti basi. Kesian customer.
Team, quick update. How many packages sent out this morning? And for the afternoon?
Boss, pagi ni sempat 80 parcel je. Banyak lagi ni. Pening dah kepala.
Boss, yang 80 tu pun gua angkat macam orang gila. Tadi J&T punya driver dah marah-marah.
Boss, 80 je? Tapi order masuk 200 lebih kot. Macam mana ni?
Okay, Kak Yah, Farhan, just take a quick lunch break. Then resume. Muthu, please manage customer expectations.
Takpe Boss, saya makan sambil key-in la. Takde masa nak rehat ni.
Gua pun makan berdiri je lah. Nak kemas pallet lagi ni.
Kak Yah, Farhan, I know you guys busy. But customer Lim already called me 3 times. He say if today cannot ship, he want cancel order.
Walao eh! Cancel order? Dah penat packing ni. Kak Yah, lu boleh ke?
Aduh, Muthu, janganlah cakap macam tu. Tengah key-in ni, nanti lagi lambat. Order Lim tu besar, kena double check.
Any progress report for the afternoon, team?
Boss, tengah cuba siapkan lagi 100 tracking numbers. Tapi mata dah merah ni.
Boss, barang makin bertimbun. Courier Ninja Van pulak cakap dia lambat nak datang. Pukul 5 baru sampai kot.
Ninja Van lambat? Aiyo, this is bad, wei! We promise customer today!
Muthu, janganlah menjerit. Saya dengar ni.
Boss, gua rasa nak pengsan dah ni. Semua benda tak gerak.
Farhan, take 10 minutes to rest. We don't want anyone to burn out.
Takpe Boss. Rest pun tak guna, barang still bertimbun. Baik gua angkat.
Ninja Van dah sampai! Cepat Farhan! Banyak barang nak kena scan ni.
Okay Kak Yah, gua dah kat sana. Mari lah ka-chiong!
Hurry up guys! Last push!
Alright team, it's getting late. Status update before we close for the day?
Boss, total 250 parcels keluar hari ni. Ada lagi 50 lebih tak sempat nak key-in. Esok kena sambung awal pagi.
Boss, badan dah hancur ni. Barang dah clear sikit. Tapi esok pagi datang dah bertimbun balik.
Boss, not bad lah for today. 250 is good. But that 50 must clear first thing tomorrow.
Good effort everyone. Kak Yah, Farhan, you two especially. Go home, rest. We tackle the remaining tomorrow.
Okay Boss. Terima kasih. Mata dah tak nampak dah ni.
Thanks Boss. Selamat malam semua. Rasa nak tidur terus sampai raya.
Good job team! Tomorrow we repeat, more sales!
Muthu, go home. Rest. Everyone needs to recharge. See you all tomorrow.
Roger Boss! Good night!
Muthu, jom lepak mamak Hakim. Penat gila siot harini.
On wei! Gua dah sampai, order teh tarik satu.
